title: massdevelopment.com
description:
MassDevelopment, a state agency for finance and development, partners with businesses, 
nonprofit organizations, financial institutions, and local communities to stimulate economic 
growth throughout the state. In fiscal year 2017, MassDevelopment financed or managed 377 projects, 
which attracted more than $4 billion in investment to the Massachusetts economy. These projects are expected 
to create approximately 9,488 jobs and build or renovate approximately 1,863 housing units.
